name: V2 - Asset Folder Creation - Property Registry Batch 10

nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Manual trigger only for Module 3B batch test. Do not activate automatically.

nodes.name: Read Central - Property Registry
nodes.notes: Reads only from Clarity V2 - Central Database / Property Registry. Does not read boss sheets.

nodes.name: Select Eligible Asset Rows - Batch 10
nodes.notes: Filters Active Listing / Active Listing + CMA rows, skips rows with existing Asset Folder Link, returns up to 10 rows.

nodes.name: Create Drive - Asset Folders
nodes.notes: Creates up to 10 folders inside Clarity V2 - Production / 02 Listing Asset Folders.

nodes.name: Prepare Registry Asset Updates
nodes.notes: Maps each created Google Drive folder back to the matching selected Property Registry row by item index.

nodes.name: Update Central - Property Registry
nodes.notes: Writes only to Clarity V2 - Central Database / Property Registry. Matches on Source Key.

meta.description: Creates up to 10 Google Drive asset folders for eligible active listings from Clarity V2 Property Registry.
safety: Reads and writes only Clarity V2 Central Database / Property Registry
Does not read or write boss sheets
Creates up to 10 folders per run
Skips rows with existing Asset Folder Link
Uses James-owned Clarity V2 production folder
